caption: The scene is a bright, clear day in an urban environment, captured in a realistic style with a vibrant and active tone. The area features a wide, asphalt road with two lanes for traffic in each direction, clearly marked with solid yellow lines in the center and white dashed lines separating the lanes. Crosswalks are visible at intersections, indicated by white parallel lines. On one side of the road, a two-story brick building with large windows and a dark roof stands prominently, surrounded by a well-maintained grassy area and a few trees. Adjacent to the building, a street light with a dark pole extends over the road. Further down the road, there is a gray building with a modern facade and a flat roof, featuring several windows and a green door. Utility poles with multiple power lines run parallel to the road, connecting various structures and providing power. Small commercial signs are scattered along the road, indicating various businesses. Cars are parked in designated areas near the buildings and on the side streets. The other side of the road continues with more commercial buildings and parking lots. The large two-story brick building is located on the left side of the road, and the gray building is positioned on the right side. Utility poles run along both sides of the road, and the street lights are positioned at regular intervals. The 360 scene is faultless.
